pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh and task_utils.sh which use this path for task execution
Verified against create_chinook_odb.py table_order (line 137) which converts SQLite 'customers' to HSQLDB 'Customer' with capital C. Verifier regex confirms lookup as CREATE TABLE "Customer"

Column name follows standard database naming conventions (camelCase). Does not exist in original Chinook schema (verified by querying SQLite customers table which has 13 columns: CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Company, Address, City, State, Country, PostalCode, Phone, Fax, Email, SupportRepId)
Verified as appropriate SQL type for loyalty points counter. Matches HSQLDB type system and verifier checks (line 140-142 of verifier.py check for INTEGER or INT)
Verified as correct default value for loyalty points. Verifier checks for 'DEFAULT 0' in HSQLDB schema (line 147 of verifier.py)
Column name follows standard database naming conventions (camelCase). Does not exist in original Chinook schema
Verified as appropriate SQL type for tier names (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond). Matches HSQLDB type system
Verified as sufficient length for membership tier names. Verifier checks for VARCHAR(20) exactly (line 164 of verifier.py)
Verified as correct default tier. Verifier checks for 'DEFAULT \'Bronze\'' in HSQLDB schema (line 175 of verifier.py)

pi_items.verified_value: Chinook Digital Media Store database - real, publicly available sample database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database
pi_items.source: Verified by examining SQLite source database at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/dbeaver_env/data/chinook.db and cross-referencing with official Chinook database documentation at https://schemaspy.org/samples/chinook/tables/Customer.html

pi_items.verified_value: 13 columns: CustomerId (INTEGER PK), FirstName (NVARCHAR(40) NOT NULL), LastName (NVARCHAR(20) NOT NULL), Company (NVARCHAR(80)), Address (NVARCHAR(70)), City (NVARCHAR(40)), State (NVARCHAR(40)), Country (NVARCHAR(40)), PostalCode (NVARCHAR(10)), Phone (NVARCHAR(24)), Fax (NVARCHAR(24)), Email (NVARCHAR(60) NOT NULL), SupportRepId (INTEGER FK)
pi_items.source: SQLite PRAGMA table_info query and official Chinook schema documentation

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available digital media store sample database used for SQL training and testing. The Customer table currently contains 13 columns (CustomerId through SupportRepId) without any loyalty program fields. The task requires adding two new columns: LoyaltyPoints (INTEGER, default 0) for tracking customer loyalty points, and MembershipTier (VARCHAR(20), default 'Bronze') for membership tier tracking. The database file will be located at /home/ga/chinook.odb as an ODF/HSQLDB embedded database. All metadata column specifications (names, types, lengths, defaults) are correct and follow standard database design conventions.
